'''Cujicor''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Pakuuni sector/Legends|Pakuuni sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]].

==History==
This [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] planet was on the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] invasion path which the invaders promised to spare in return for captured [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]]. It was here that the [[Peace Brigade]] captured [[Swilja Fenn]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Recovery]]'' {{Mo}}
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Edge of Victory I: Conquest]]'' {{1stm}}
